positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala design depicting celestial bodies, constellations, and flowing cosmic energy. Geometric patterns are interwoven with stylized lunar and floral elements. The color palette utilizes deep indigo, radiant gold, and contrasting pops of neon cyan and magenta. Focus on strong radial symmetry, clean silhouettes, and sharp, intricate linework suitable for screen-printing on apparel. Minimalist yet rich composition, perfectly centered. Vector illustration style, high contrast, volumetric lighting, graphic novel aesthetic.
